name: Role-Playing Game (RPG)
description: Classic RPG with character progression, quests, and narrative choices

mechanics.coreLoop: Explore world → Accept quests → Battle enemies → Gain experience → Level up → Unlock new areas
playerActions: Accept and complete quests from NPCs
Engage in turn-based or real-time combat
Level up character attributes (strength, intelligence, etc.)
Make dialogue choices that affect story

mechanics: Experience points (XP) from combat and quests

failConditions: Game over screen if party is wiped

resourceSystems.name: Health Points (HP)
resourceSystems.mechanics: Depletes in combat, restored with potions or rest

resourceSystems.name: Mana Points (MP)
resourceSystems.mechanics: Used for casting spells, regenerates over time

resourceSystems.name: Gold
resourceSystems.mechanics: Currency for buying items from merchants

resourceSystems.name: Crafting Materials
resourceSystems.mechanics: Collected from enemies and environment, used for upgrades

setting.location: Continent of Eldoria with diverse biomes (forests, deserts, mountains, cities)
setting.worldType: High fantasy with magic and mythical creatures

protagonist.background: A young adventurer from a humble village, destined for greatness
protagonist.motivation: Discover the truth about their mysterious heritage and save the world from an ancient evil

conflict.primary: An ancient dark lord has awakened and threatens to plunge the world into eternal darkness
secondary: Rival adventuring party competing for the same goal
Internal struggle with a cursed power

worldRules.physics: Standard gravity and physics, but magic can bend these rules
worldRules.magic: Elemental magic system (fire, water, earth, air, light, dark) powered by mana. Each spell has a cost and cooldown. Forbidden magic exists but corrupts the user.
worldRules.technology: Pre-industrial: swords, bows, medieval armor. No gunpowder or machinery.

difficulty: Moderate learning curve with deep systems
targetAudience: Players who enjoy narrative depth and character customization
